name: MíManny
short_description: Trapped in a dark environment, you must escape from the relentless Butcher. Every shadow hides a threat, and every mistake could be your last in this tense survival horror experience. Will you survive the night?
detailed_description:
About This Game

Experience the nightmare in MíManny, a tense survival horror game that will test your nerves.

You find yourself trapped in a dark, claustrophobic environment where every shadow could be your last. You are not alone. The Butcher, a relentless antagonist armed with a machete, is hunting you down.

Key Features:

  • Intense Survival: Hide, run, and stay out of sight to survive the Butcher's blade.

  • Dark Atmosphere: Explore eerie corridors filled with dread and psychological horror.

  • Brutal Encounters: Every mistake can lead to a violent and bloody end.

Can you find a way out, or will you become another victim of the Butcher?

early version.
Needs improvement

Hey dev:

Add some voicelines for more immersion.
